file_name: Henke et al. - 2024 - Advancing precision medicine in cutaneous oncology through 3D high-frequency ultrasound imaging..json

did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper used traditional image processing algorithms (bilateral Gaussian filter, binarization, convex hull) implemented in Mathematica and MATLAB to construct 3D tumor models from sparse HFUS data. While the authors state that these simple algorithms can be used to train future machine learning programs, the study itself did not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
